curation_notes: Pre-assigned as null-deref from CWE-476, but reclassified to auth-bypass. CWE-304 (Missing Critical Step in Authentication) is the primary weakness: the socketHandler function never calls options.AuthenticateMethod for WebSocket requests, completely bypassing authentication. The nil pointer dereference on UserData is a secondary consequence, not the root cause. The patch adds the missing authentication call and unauthorized-request handling to socketHandler in websocket.go. Only one source file was modified. Location derived directly from the patch diff.
